hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '(^|[;&|(]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*((sudo|command|time|nohup|doas|xargs)[[:space:]]+|env([[:space:]]+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*=[^[:space:]]*)*[[:space:]]+)*(npm|pnpm|yarn)([[:space:]]|$)' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use bun, not npm/pnpm/yarn, in this repo (e.g. bun install, bun run <script>, bunx <pkg>)."}}' || true
